hero.title: The All-in-One ERP in Tunisia
hero.subtitleSuffix: for your business. VAGA digitizes your operations with modern, robust tools at an affordable price for Tunisian SMEs.

apps.title: A Complete and Modular Business Management Software
apps.subtitle: From invoicing to inventory management, activate only the ERP modules you need. Total flexibility for your SME in Sousse and across Tunisia.

carbon.title: Annual Carbon Report
carbon.subtitle: VAGA automatically collects your activity data and calculates your CO₂e emissions across three scopes, without manual entry. Get a certified report ready for your partners and European tenders.

infrastructure.cloudDescription: Your ERP hosted on our secure servers. Access VAGA from any browser, anywhere in the world — without worrying about updates, backups or server maintenance.
infrastructure.cloudFeature4: Ideal for multi-site and mobile teams
infrastructure.boxTagline: Your on-premise ERP. Runs even if the DSL goes down.
infrastructure.boxDescription: A discreet mini-PC installed on your premises. Your ERP runs locally — DSL cut, Ooredoo or Topnet outage — nothing stops your production. Ideal for warehouses and areas with unstable connectivity.
infrastructure.boxFeature2: Data stored on your own premises
infrastructure.calloutText: DSL outages remain frequent in Sousse, Sfax, and industrial areas. With Vaga Box, your team keeps working — delivery notes, inventory, invoicing — without interruption.

carbon.feature1: Automatic CO₂e calculation per ISO 14064 standards
carbon.feature2: Certified PDF report generated in one click
carbon.feature3: Export-Ready for the EU & international markets

faqItems.q: How does migration from Excel work?
faqItems.a: We guide you every step of the way. Our experts import your current data directly into VAGA SUITE. The transition is smooth with no loss of history.

faqItems.q: Is VAGA SUITE compliant with regulations?
faqItems.a: Absolutely. VAGA SUITE is fully compliant with current Tunisian accounting and tax standards, and is regularly updated to reflect any legislative changes.

faqItems.q: What type of support do you offer?
faqItems.a: We offer dedicated and responsive local support, available by phone and email. An initial training session is also included to ensure your teams can get up to speed quickly.
We place great importance on data sovereignty. Your information is stored on secure servers with automatic daily backups. You remain the sole owner of your data.
Unlike classic SaaS solutions that charge you every month indefinitely, our model is transparent. You pay for what you use, without mandatory monthly license fees that increase over time.
Yes, we offer support packages to configure the software to your specific needs and train your team for immediate adoption.

faqItems.q: Can I import my existing data (Excel, etc.)?
faqItems.a: Absolutely. Vaga Suite allows easy import of your product, client and supplier lists via Excel or CSV files so you can start working in minutes.

faqItems.q: Is the software scalable to the size of my business?
faqItems.a: Absolutely. You can start with the Inventory and Sales module, then add Accounting or HR as your business grows. You only pay for the features you actually need.
